rulings.Case Title: IAN DUGGAN ET AL VS. GARY TSIFRIN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing Of Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Obtain Judgment On Award
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 26, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANTs GARY TSIFRIN, FRANCESCA WONG, JEFF WINTER, and CLAUDIA WINTER's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Obtain Judgment On Award continued to August 21, 2019 for moving party to provide a courtesy copy of the arbitration award by July 31, 2019 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. If parties agree on a different date for a hearing (after August 21, 2019), parties may jointly notify the Court to avoid an appearance solely for the purpose of contesting the new hearing date. The notification may be provided to department 501 at Department501ContestTR@sftc.org no later than 8:00 a.m. on July 26, 2019. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: 920 MONTGOMERY, LLC VS. SUNHA YOON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 26, 2019 line 7. DEFENDANT SUNHA YOON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to attach a complete copy of the agreement regarding the premises. CCP 1166. Plaintiff's contention that utilities in this case are "housing services" and therefore are "rent" under SFRO 37.2(p) is not supported by authority. Under SFRO 37.2(g) "housing services" are services provided by the landlord. The lease between the parties provides at paragraph 25 that "tenant shall pay directly for all utilities, services and charges provided to the Premises," i.e. utilities are not services provided by the landlord. = (501/CFH)
